basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Ocean Technology (NIOT) Consultants Notification 2026 has been released on 15-05-2026 on the official website niot.res.in. Have been announced through the NIOT Consultants Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 63 years of age who have a Bachelor’s degree in the relevant stream with 10 years of relevant experience (Retired Government officers preferred) are eligible to apply for these Consultants vacancies. The offline application process for NIOT Consultants Recruitment 2026 is open and will remain available until 12-06-2026. Candidates can download the official notification

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 63 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in relevant stream, 10 years relevant experience, Retired Government officers preferred
qualification.details: Sr. Consultant / Consultant (Administration/ Establishment): Sr. Consultant: Retired as Deputy Secretary/Director or equivalent (Pay Level-12/13); Consultant: Retired Pay Level-8/9/10/11 or 10 years hands-on experience; Bachelor's degree in any stream; 10 years relevant experience. Sr. Consultant / Consultant (Finance & Accounts): Sr. Consultant: Retired as Deputy Secretary/Director or equivalent (Pay Level-12/13); Consultant: Retired Pay Level-8/9/10/11 or 10 years hands-on experience; Bachelor's degree in any stream; 10 years relevant experience. Consultant (Stores & Procurement): Retired Pay Level-8/9/10/11 or 10 years hands-on experience; Bachelor's degree in any stream; 10 years relevant experience. Consultant (Works Management / Estate Maintenance): Retired Pay Level-8/9/10/11 or 10 years hands-on experience (State Govt. PWD officers considered); Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in Civil or Electrical Engineering; 10 years relevant experience. Consultant (Legal): Retired Pay Level-8/9/10/11 or 10 years hands-on experience; Bachelor’s Degree in Law; 10 years relevant experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIOT Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: niot.res.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIOT Consultants Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the NIOT Consultants Recruitment 2026 is 12th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Consultant posts at NIOT?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Consultant posts at NIOT will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000/- per month. This is a fixed remuneration for the contract period.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applying to NIOT Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Consultant positions at NIOT is 63 years. There are no specific age relaxations mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for NIOT Consultants Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the NIOT Consultants Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the specified address.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for NIOT Consultants Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NIOT Consultants Recruitment 2026. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for NIOT Consultants Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for NIOT Consultants Recruitment 2026 involves two stages: Shortlisting of eligible candidates based on their qualifications and experience, followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the minimum experience required for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: For Consultant positions, a minimum of 10 years of relevant experience is required. For Sr. Consultant positions, specific retired pay levels or equivalent experience is preferred.

faq.question: Q8. Which educational qualification is required for the Consultant (Works Management / Estate Maintenance) post?
faq.answer: For the Consultant (Works Management / Estate Maintenance) post, candidates should possess a Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in Civil or Electrical Engineering, along with 10 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q9. Can retired government officers apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Yes, retired Government officers are preferred for these Consultant positions. Specific eligibility criteria for retired officers are mentioned in the detailed notification for each post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form for NIOT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the National Institute of Ocean Technology (NIOT), which is niot.res.in. Links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
